mapper.insert: insert into ygt_campaign_goods (ygt_cg_campaign_id, ygt_cg_nx_community_goods_id, ygt_cg_goods_name_snapshot, ygt_cg_standard_snapshot, ygt_cg_unit_snapshot, ygt_cg_price_snapshot, ygt_cg_sort, ygt_cg_status, ygt_cg_create_time, ygt_cg_update_time) values (#{ygtCgCampaignId}, #{ygtCgNxCommunityGoodsId}, #{ygtCgGoodsNameSnapshot}, #{ygtCgStandardSnapshot}, #{ygtCgUnitSnapshot}, #{ygtCgPriceSnapshot}, #{ygtCgSort}, #{ygtCgStatus}, #{ygtCgCreateTime}, #{ygtCgUpdateTime})
mapper.delete: delete from ygt_campaign_goods where ygt_campaign_goods_id in #{id}
